metadata.source: Anthropic webinar — Claude for Legal Teams

speakers.name: Mark Pike
speakers.role: Anthropic legal team / product lead for Claude for the legal industry

answer_status_legend.answered_live: Mark or Maggie addressed the question substantively during the webinar
answer_status_legend.partially_answered: Touched on but not fully answered
answer_status_legend.not_addressed: Did not get answered live; covered in companion skill pack
answer_status_legend.n/a: Reaction or off-topic comment, not a real question

questions.author: Jewel Seo
questions.question: How is your team dealing with attorney-client privilege when using Claude?

questions.author: Carrie Schultz
questions.question: Will you be addressing security and best practices for security with Claude?

questions.author: Rodney Younce
questions.question: How do you keep all information — especially sensitive case files — confidential and secure? How do we explain to clients that their data is safely used?

questions.author: Julie Saliba
questions.question: What security considerations should be taken into account when linking to inbox or using via MCP?

questions.author: Varinder Rehal
questions.question: I didn't know there was a Cowork legal plugin — where can I find it and how do I implement it?

questions.author: Sipoura Barzideh
questions.question: Will you be emailing out the links listed in the Docs section?

questions.author: Anonymous
questions.question: Legal work can involve 70+ page documents. With detailed context and tool calls, there's increased risk of context rot and degraded output. How does Claude's legal team address this?

questions.author: Michael Graham
questions.question: Many firms don't use Gmail or even Outlook — work is stored in a document management or case management system. How can Claude read these files? Does it need a specific integration?

questions.author: Todd Taylor
questions.question: I'm interested in building agents in Claude (we have a Team account) for legal work. How would that be different than a skill?

questions.author: Nikolaj Nielsen
questions.question: Hallucinations are a significant concern in legal document review — often requiring full verification. How does Anthropic differentiate its models on mitigating hallucinations and ensuring reliability?

questions.author: Tian Luo
questions.question: When should you use Haiku vs Sonnet vs Opus?

questions.author: Tian Luo
questions.question: Is there a reason to use Cowork over Claude Code?

questions.author: Aviv Geron
questions.question: What's your recommended methodology for verifying Claude's legal outputs before they go to senior reviewers or regulators?

questions.author: Aishwarya Belle
questions.question: As a transactional lawyer, I struggle with tracking which version of the document reflects changes made by multiple parties. Can Claude give a comparison for that?

questions.author: Rebecca Wright
questions.question: It would be helpful to have a glossary of terms — e.g. what is a 'skill' vs a 'plugin' and how are they different?

questions.author: Brint Hiatt
questions.question: Would appreciate steps on how to get started from the very beginning. I've never used Claude, only ChatGPT.

questions.author: Shivangi Agarwal
questions.question: File types used so far are docx, md, csv. Does Claude have the same accuracy with PDFs of old sale deeds and illegible documents? What about JPEGs? These are common in IP and property litigation.

questions.author: Frances Winkler
questions.question: Who builds these 'skills' — the team, or are they standardized generic skills?

questions.author: Anonymous
questions.question: Can you explain how to use skills for more reliable output in legal work?

questions.author: Andrew Amoranto
questions.question: How do you roll out live artifacts (like dashboards) and other apps you build for yourself to the rest of the legal team?

questions.author: Gianni Carfi Pavia
questions.question: How do you see the Claude Microsoft Word add-in combined with tailored skills changing how legal professionals work with contracts and other legal docs?

questions.author: Tyler Niederwerder
questions.question: Can Claude automatically decide which skills to use?

questions.author: Syed Ali Khan
questions.question: Is information provided to / reviewed by Claude 'sandboxed' — i.e. not used to train or improve the product?

questions.author: Anonymous
questions.question: What's the time commitment and lift to get all of these (add-ins, plugins, Cowork, etc.) set up to operate at the level legal teams require?

questions.author: Sofia Rodriguez
questions.question: For contract review, what's the best way to structure a project or prompt to systematically review SOWs against a legal playbook — flagging non-standard terms, summarizing technical scope, and identifying customer-specific requirements outside industry standards?

questions.author: Gareth Last
questions.question: What skill, plugin, or schedule has Mark or his team created that has had a big impact or been a huge efficiency improvement for the Anthropic Legal Team?

questions.author: Merve Yilmaz
questions.question: Any legal research tips? I'm currently replacing external counsel advice on product expansion. What guardrails should I build?

questions.author: Valter Pasanen
questions.question: Can you verify sources and paragraphs used in texts in detail when using Claude?

questions.author: David Andrews
questions.question: We're a small firm on a Team-level plan. Are the same features available to us as Enterprise, at our smaller scale?

questions.author: Christian Fleischmann
questions.question: Is the Word plugin leveraging the playbooks created in Cowork?

questions.author: Matthew Fitterer
questions.question: Can skills be specific to a particular user, or are they always available / applicable organization-wide?

questions.author: Scott Ludwig
questions.question: Will the docs be available after the presentation?

questions.author: Vernicka Shaw
questions.question: How do you do the redline?

questions.author: Alexis Hartwell-Gobeske
questions.question: Can Claude be set up to provide automatic updates about filing deadlines, hearing dates, etc.?

questions.author: Jack Kegelmeyer
questions.question: Are the skills prepackaged?

questions.author: Ben Kühnel
questions.question: What are the plans for the legal plugin in the future? Right now it 'only' consists of some Claude skills (markdown documents).

questions.author: Robert Graham
questions.question: How do you suggest feeding Claude skills that incorporate our voice, tone, and position, in combination with the legal plugin?

questions.author: Ryan Malek
questions.question: If you already have Claude Code configured with MCPs, Skills, Plugins, CLAUDE.md etc., is it better to use it for legal work or start over with Cowork?

questions.author: Maddie Rana
questions.question: Did you say 20K?

questions.author: Priyanka Mehta
questions.question: Do you rely completely on Claude's output, or do you need to recheck documents to ensure it hasn't missed points or red flags?

questions.author: Tom Harriman
questions.question: What enterprise-level controls are in place for skills? Can they be provisioned and assigned to specific user groups (e.g. Real Estate users with focused skills specific to their practice)?

questions.author: Orietta Blanco
questions.question: Can Claude compare large volumes of documents that come in different formats?

questions.author: Romina Villarroel
questions.question: Are there other plugins you recommend for a small law firm? (We don't have a marketing or accounting team, for example.)

questions.author: RUPESH SINGH
questions.question: Excited for the session.

questions.author: Angela Bostick
questions.question: Is Cowork part of Claude?

questions.author: Montserrat Mazo
questions.question: What mindset or process changes did they make to better organize the information that forms the basis for all of this? How did they transition from unstructured, free-flowing text to something more organized?

questions.author: Aakash Sharma
questions.question: Can I use legal skills with chat also?

questions.author: Andra Robinson
questions.question: Is Cowork currently in beta? (Answered: Cowork is now GA.)

questions.author: Vernicka Shaw
questions.question: That's amazing.

questions.author: Melissa Lee
questions.question: How do we get Claude to redline documents?

questions.author: Mary Prager
questions.question: How do you shift from doing work individually in your own Claude instance to collaborating within the legal team and cross-functionally? Is there a way to do that seamlessly within Claude, or do we still need to move out (to Slack, email, etc.)?
